base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bridge_zone — a tile from 1991 sonic the hedgehog. Bridge Zone — Acts 1-3. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Bridge Zone — Acts 1-3; wooden bridges over lake
